Some New Anime Movies
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 20th September, 2004 at 17:24 GMT
  
Hey, I've added three new anime movies to the site. Fatal Fury, Ninja Scroll and the long awaited Ghost In The Shell 2 - Innocence. I have ensured the copy of ghost in the shell 2 is top notch as I encoded it myself. I'll also try and get the dubbed version of Ghost in the Shell 2 up soon aswell. Please Enjoy......And keep donating please :)
2 New Music Videos
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 18th September, 2004 at 12:00 GMT
  
Hey, I've added two new music videos from the nano 2nd production team. They're both pretty good....so take a look. I'll be adding 2 new anime movies and the latest naruto episodes early next week; as the server is very slow at the moment with all these people downloading.
Media Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 17th September, 2004 at 23:21 GMT
  
Our hosts have finished sorting out their network....please continue downloading as usual.
Media Down For 2 Hours
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 17th September, 2004 at 20:25 GMT
  
Hey, I've been notified that our media hosts are doing some maintainance to their network....The Media will be down for another two hours at the most. Sorry for the inconvenience.
Blood: The Last Vampire + Ghost in the Shell: Series Reviews
 

Posted By: Dante
Date: Friday 17th September, 2004 at 04:02 GMT
  
Hey everyone it's sure been a while since I posted anything new so I decided to cut some time from doing my homework =yeah I know what a bad thing to do ;)= and write up two reviews on animes that I picked up during the weekend. The first one was Blood: The Last Vampire and then I checked out Ghost in the Shell: Stand Alone Complex the Series. So if you got some free time to spare you should read them. The Ghost in the Shell review is probably one of the best reviews I've written yet. Also the boxart images on the reviews will not show at the moment for I believe there is something wrong with uploading the pictures to the server. So I'll let JamJar fix that. Anyways sit tight, relax, and have fun reading.
Interview Update
 

Posted By: Spike
Date: Wednesday 15th September, 2004 at 01:55 GMT
  
I uploaded the Jay Hickman interview. You can check it out: Here I haven't had time to edit it yet so it may be a little confusing, I'll try to fix that by tomorrow. Also, I'm working on some interviews with Monica Rial, Joshua Seth, Sandra Marie, and Jennifer Sekiguchi. So keep an eye out for 'em!
Some New Media
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 14th September, 2004 at 15:02 GMT
  
Hey, sorry I couldn't make the update over the weekend, I was having a few problems with the server. However all the stuff is now up for you to download. I would also like to take this opportunity to ask you to keep the donations coming, wer're lagging behind at the moment, only $55 of $200 and we're almost half way through the month. Be sure to check back here some time next week, as the long awaited ghost in the shell sequel; Innocence should be up for download. This Update:

*Ghost In The Shell Series
*Dragonball Movies
*Love Hina Series
*Buu's Fury GBA Rom
*Latest Naruto Manga Chapters

Please Enjoy........
Quick Update
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 11th September, 2004 at 11:24 GMT
  
Hey, sorry we havn't updated much in the week. We've all been really busy with school, etc... I'm currently uploading some new media which I will release tonight, (approximately 6pm). Thanks for being patient.
A Bit Sluggish
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 6th September, 2004 at 18:15 GMT
  
You have probably, noticed that the downloads are quite slow at the moment, it's because there is something wrong with our servers internet connection. I'm told it should be fixed pretty quickly, you can still download, it just may take a bit longer. Nothing really to worry about.
Media OK + New Anime Movies
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 4th September, 2004 at 23:06 GMT
  
Hey, i've changed round our download system, some good news, but also some bad. I have had a program installed on the media server which only allows one connection per IP Address, basically you will now only be able to download one file at a time. I did not want to do this, but I had no choice as people were using download managers to open multiple connections to our server; causing it to become extremely slow. I have also enabled hotlink protection which may cause some people to recieve errors when they try to download. However this problem is not as serious, in most cases all you will have to do is disable your firewall, or internet security program to be able to download files. Firewalls and internet security programs block referrer settings, meaning the media server doesn't know which site is linking to its files. However it's not all bad, all of this means that download speeds will increase.

We recommend using internet explorer 6, with no download manager. If you have any problems please post them in the 'Help Me!' section on our forums.

I have also put four new anime movies up for download, you can find them in the anime movies section. :)
